creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 182639
Patch to update sysutils/garcon

- Update to 0.6.0
- Adjust dependencies (reported by QA script)
- Regenerate configure patch (with 'make makepatch')

Note: In the next release libgarcon-2 will be dropped (that's why libgarcon-gtk3-1.pc is patched, it works fine with libgarcon-1 library). Then currently we need both Gtk (2 and 3) but in the future Gtk2 support will be optional.
